notes: v2.5.12 — required update. Department milestones are back in the cross-project Planner (and filters now tell you when milestones are hidden), and budgeted workforce hours are no longer over-counted when a department shares one budget window across roles. Workforce planner: logged hours credit the right project, future-dated build windows account for work already done, the Build Hours manager warns on over-commitment and bad dates, and the slippage tracker now names the culprit projects and departments and offers a guided fix. Tickets: My Tickets and the notification bell are open to everyone, and IT tickets can now be assigned or claimed. Purchasing: Assembly Readiness loads again (it had stopped opening on every project). Projects: a new Builds filter surfaces already-shipped builds, and refreshing no longer drops you with an Invalid Project ID. Quality: you can close an NCR that still has an open CAPA (with a warning), and the NCR vendor picker no longer opens behind the form. Plus a redesigned drag-and-drop Knowledge Base tree, ECN worklist filter and sort by who raised it, cleaner vendor pickers and a Vendors tab under Projects, QR-scanner consume improvements (paired materials, quality holds, single-item consume, undo), scanner consume attribution and date fixes, more reliable file and document handling, and another round of CATIA remote-view display and input work. This release also updates the database behind AOS, so older versions will not work correctly against it — please update as soon as you are prompted.
